manifests.contents:
[package]
name = "api-server"
edition = "2024"
version = "0.0.1"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.8.6"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.50.0"
features = ["full"]

[dev-dependencies]
serde_json = "1.0"
tower = "0.5"

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "api-server"
edition = "2024"
required-features = []

skeleton.lock_file:
version = 4
